package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for router_setup_runs_migrations: Gin router or handler setup code that also performs migrations.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule155NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule155NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule155NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario155Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule155NegativeService, input Rule155NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
